# Aditya Raj Singh — dev.adityarajsingh.com

> Personal developer site of Aditya Raj Singh: open-source projects, MCP servers, automation, and homelab builds.

## Projects

- [Slack Lists MCP Server](https://dev.adityarajsingh.com/slack-lists-mcp/): Open-source Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that gives AI assistants like Claude full read AND write access to Slack Lists. Eight tools — create, read, filter, export, update (check off / reassign / reschedule / edit), delete, and discover columns. MIT-licensed, written in Python (FastMCP). A fork of maplehilllabs/mcp-slack-lists that adds the write side. Source: https://github.com/justadityaraj/slack-lists-mcp
- [Freedcamp MCP Server](https://dev.adityarajsingh.com/freedcamp-mcp/): Open-source Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that gives AI assistants like Claude full read AND write access to Freedcamp across every project. Twelve tools — discover projects, task lists and users; create, list, update and delete tasks; create and update projects (archive / unarchive); and add, edit and delete comments — all bulk-capable. MIT-licensed, written in TypeScript (Node), with stdio + HTTP transports and an AWS SSM credential launcher. Source: https://github.com/justadityaraj/freedcamp-mcp
- [Amazon.in MCP Server](https://dev.adityarajsingh.com/amazon-in-mcp/): Open-source Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that lets AI assistants like Claude shop on Amazon.in. Three tools — search_amazon_in (ranked listings plus cheapest-in-stock and best-value picks), get_product (full detail from an ASIN or URL), and price_history_link (a Keepa chart URL, no network call). No API keys, no accounts; runs locally over stdio, scraping HTML with rotating user agents and bot-check retries. Best-value scoring is rating × log10(reviews + 10) ÷ √price. MIT-licensed, written in TypeScript (Node), published on npm as amazon-in-mcp-server. Not affiliated with Amazon. Source: https://github.com/justadityaraj/amazon-in-mcp

## Curated

- [Starred Projects](https://dev.adityarajsingh.com/stars/): A categorized index of 170+ open-source tools Aditya stars, runs, and self-hosts — MCP servers, self-hosted/homelab, privacy, automation, macOS/Windows utilities, note-taking, and more.

## About

- [Aditya Raj Singh](https://adityarajsingh.com/): Builder focused on automation, MCP servers, and self-hosted infrastructure.
